summary: Session 5 implemented the six webview sections inside the Session 4 shell, the half-batch recovery + (shared)/(local override) indicator system, and the supporting test suite. New files: src/configEditor/sections/{types,helpers,routingAndVerificationSection,budgetSection,providersTableSection,significanceFlaggingSection,notificationsSection,localOverridesSummarySection}.ts (8 files; ~720 LOC) + src/configEditor/patch.ts (~304 LOC, SavePayload + applyPatch + setIfChanged + content-hash helpers). ConfigEditorPanel.ts was rewritten to splice section HTML into the shell, route a structured SavePayload through applyPatch into yaml AST mutations (preserving comments via the yaml@2.7 library), surface a half-batch-recovery banner with Retry / Accept-as-baseline / Re-apply actions, and detect cross-load drift via raw-text comparison. The save flow clones the loaded Documents via parseDocumentFromText(doc.toString()) before patching so a failed validation leaves in-memory + on-disk state untouched. Retry writes the bytes cached in _recovery.pendingContents at the time of the original save (not from _loaded.*Doc which gets re-read from disk by _refresh). Test count: 38 -> 109 unit tests passing; tsc clean. Cross-provider verification: 4 successful gpt-5-4 rounds (Part A sections, Part B1 patch.ts, B2 round 1, B2 round 2) raised 1 Minor + 2 Major + 5 issues (1 Blocker + 2 Major + 2 Major) respectively — all 8 findings addressed in code per verifier guidance. B2 round 3 confirmation hit OpenAI 429 Too Many Requests after retries (TPM bucket not refreshing within a 15-minute wait window); operator can re-run scripts/verify_session_026_5_b2.py to confirm fixes once the rate-limit window clears. Total Session 5 verification spend: $1.218 (cumulative Set 026 NTE: $3.07 of $10.00).

reason.specifics: Session 6 ships the significance-flagging command (dabbler.flagDecisionForReview) + annotation parser + scanner + ai_router/decision_review_queue.py + workflow-doc update + 6 test files. Bounded surface (one command + one parser + one scanner). Spec routing notes call for Opus at effort=medium.

deferred_followups: B2 round 3 cross-provider verification confirmation — operator can re-run `python scripts/verify_session_026_5_b2.py` once the OpenAI gpt-5-4 TPM rate-limit window clears (15+ minutes wasn't enough this session). All 3 findings from B2 round 2 are addressed in code per verifier guidance; unit tests cover the new behaviors, but a fresh independent verifier read would close the loop.
